concepts_used.title: 传染病模型 SIR
concepts_used.how_used: 将村民分为易感、感染、康复和死亡四类，并考虑潜伏期，作为模拟疾病传播的基础模型。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We first looked toward the SIR model as the foundation of our simulation. We split the people of the village into types: Susceptible, Infected, Recovered, as well as Dead. We also accounted for the potential latent period of infection.

concepts_used.title: 蒙特卡洛模拟
concepts_used.how_used: 通过多次运行模型并改变参数来模拟疾病传播，以泛化疾病行为。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: To add accuracy to our model, given relatively little information, we ran the model countless times with different parameters in an attempt to generalize the disease's behavior.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 将关键参数设为可修改变量，观察不同假设条件下的传播结果，分析模型对参数的敏感性。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: we set them as modifiable variables, seeing what would happen under different assumed conditions.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 列出6条假设并逐一给出合理理由，如单一疾病、人口恒定、传播率恒定等。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Assumption 1: All symptoms are caused by one disease. ... Justification: ...

concepts_used.title: 如何从数据中提取结论
concepts_used.how_used: 通过分析模拟数据，将疾病分类为点源爆发，并判断疫情是否被控制。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We analyzed the data we received to classify the type and severity of the disease, and whether or not the epidemic was contained. We concluded that this disease followed the behavior of a point source outbreak, and the epidemic was quickly contained.

concepts_used.title: 三天/四天赛程时间分配
concepts_used.how_used: 论文结构完整，包含摘要、引言、假设、模型、结果、结论、参考文献和附录，符合竞赛论文规范。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Table of Contents: 1. Summary, 2. Introduction, 3. Assumptions, 4. Model, 5. Conclusion, 6. Synopsis, 7. References, 8. Appendix
